allies.rationale_text: Bayesian helps statistical-learning-theory update hypotheses against evidence instead of treating the first fitting model as final truth.
Scientific-method-evidence-testing helps statistical-learning-theory frame objectives, hypotheses, and model checks before fitting a predictive system.
allies.source_quote: The essence of the scientific method

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts statistical-learning-theory when model selection is driven by the desire to protect a preferred thesis rather than by generalization performance.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistical-learning-theory conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when intuitive pattern match overrides base-rate calibration.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistical-learning-theory vs representativeness-heuristic: statistical-learning-theory conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when intuitive pattern match overrides base-rate calibration.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistical-learning-theory conflicts with survivorship-bias when training narratives ignore censored failures.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistical-learning-theory vs survivorship-bias: statistical-learning-theory conflicts with survivorship-bias when training narratives ignore censored failures.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Statistical-learning-theory conflicts with confirmation-bias when model selection is driven by confirming a preferred hypothesis rather than out-of-sample generalization performance.
structured_tensions.source_quote: statistical-learning-theory vs confirmation-bias: statistical-learning-theory conflicts with confirmation-bias when model selection is driven by confirming a preferred hypothesis rather than out-of-sample generalization performance.

curation_notes.summary: The relation file keeps the strongest bounded graph from the raw source: evidence-updating allies and the explicit anti-shortcut tension block.
donor_drops: Did not widen into broad AI-modeling neighbors because the explicit tension block already provides a disciplined first-order graph surface.
open_questions: Systems-thinking is a source-real ally, but bayesian and scientific-method-evidence-testing were the cleaner current-vocabulary anchors.
